full_description: FocusMode is a productivity app designed to help users stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a range of tools to help you achieve your goals, including the ability to block distracting websites, set timers to keep yourself on track, and track your progress over time. With FocusMode, you can customize your experience to suit your needs, whether you're working on a project, studying for an exam, or simply trying to stay on task. The app's intuitive interface makes it easy to use, and its features are designed to help you develop healthy habits and improve your overall productivity. By using FocusMode, you can reduce distractions, increase your concentration, and achieve more in less time.
